positive: Minimalist graphic design illustration of a celestial map and mystical forest silhouette, highly detailed line art combined with solid color washes. The central composition features a large, stylized crescent moon overlapping a depiction of interconnected planetary orbits (like a stylized zodiac) and branching tree silhouettes. Use deep indigo, teal, burnt orange, and gold metallic accents. The overall style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern scientific blueprint aesthetics, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric. High contrast, clean linework, highly geometric and symmetrical composition, perfect for T-shirt graphic print.
negative: blurry, amateur, low detail, text, watermark, signature, logo, cartoon, photorealistic, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, artifacts
